zh.lifeSummary: 當Adélaïde von Geldern於大約1140年出生在荷蘭蓋爾德藍德其爾文時，她的父親Heinrich I. von Geldern24歲，母親Agnes von Arnstein22歲。她和Gerard II van Loon至少有2個兒子和3個女兒。她去世於1218年2月4日在比利時利包格波格洛享年79歲，埋葬在比利時利包格庫林根。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Adélaïde von Geldern于大约1140年出生在荷兰蓋爾德藍德其爾文时，她的父亲Heinrich I. von Geldern24岁，母亲Agnes von Arnstein22岁。她和Gerard II van Loon至少有2个儿子和3个女儿。她去世于1218年2月4日在比利时利包格波格洛享年79岁，埋葬在比利时利包格庫林根。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Geldern
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Yorkshire): in northern England usually a variant of Geldard, an occupational name from Middle English gelde ‘sterile, barren’, used as a noun to denote ‘gelded cattle’, + Old English hierde, hence ‘herdman who tends the gelded cattle’.
English: alternatively, perhaps an occupational name from Middle English gelder(e) ‘gelder, castrator (of livestock)’.

variants.name: Gilder
meanings: English (Essex and Middlesex): occupational name for a goldsmith or gilder, from Middle English gilder, gelder, guldar, a derivative of Old English gyldan ‘to gild’.

nameMeanings.name: Adélaïde
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of Germanic origin (via French Adélaïde ), from adal ‘noble’ + heid ‘kind, sort’. It was borne in the 10th century by the wife of the Holy Roman Emperor Otto the Great. She became regent after his death and was revered as a saint. The given name increased in popularity in England during the 19th century, when it was borne by the wife of King William IV; she was the daughter of the ruler of the German duchy of Saxe-Meiningen. The Australian city of Adelaide was named in her honour.

en.lifeSummary: When Adélaïde von Geldern was born about 1140, in Zilven, Gelderland, Netherlands, her father, Heinrich I. von Geldern, was 24 and her mother, Agnes von Arnstein, was 22. She had at least 2 sons and 3 daughters with Gerard II van Loon. She died on 4 February 1218, in Borgloon, Limburg, Belgium, at the age of 79, and was buried in Kuringen, Limburg, Belgium.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Adélaïde von Geldern est née environ 1140, à Zilven, Gueldre, Pays-Bas, son père, Heinrich I. von Geldern, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Agnes von Arnstein, avait 22 ans. Elle a eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles avec Gerard II van Loon. Elle est décédée le 4 février 1218, à Borgloon, Limbourg, Belgique, à l’âge de 79 ans, et a été enterrée à Kuringen, Limbourg, Belgique.

de.lifeSummary: Als Adélaïde von Geldern um 1140 in Zilven, Geldern, Niederlande geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Heinrich I. von Geldern 24 und ihre Mutter Agnes von Arnstein 22. Sie hatte mit Gerard II van Loon mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 4. Februar 1218 im Alter von 79 Jahren in Borgloon, Limburg, Belgien und wurde in Kuringen, Limburg, Belgien begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Adélaïde von Geldern è nata il circa 1140 nel Zilven, Gelderland, Paesi Bassi, sua padre, Heinrich I. von Geldern, aveva 24 anni e sua madre, Agnes von Arnstein, aveva 22 anni. Lei avuto almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie con Gerard II van Loon. Morì il 4 febbraio 1218, nel Borgloon, Limburgo, Belgio, all'età di 79 anni, e fu sepolta a Kuringen, Limburgo, Belgio.

ja.lifeSummary: Adélaïde von Geldernが約1140年にオランダジェルダーランドズイルベンで生まれた時，父Heinrich I. von Geldernは24歳，母Agnes von Arnsteinは22歳であった。彼女はGerard II van Loonとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1218年2月4日にベルギーリンブルグボルグロオンで79歳で死去し，ベルギーリンブルグクリンジェンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Adélaïde von Geldern(이)가 대략 1140년 네덜란드 글델랜드 지븐에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Heinrich I. von Geldern(은)는 24세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Agnes von Arnstein(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 Gerard II van Loon(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1218년 2월 4일 벨기에 림버그 볼그루에서 79세의 나이로 사망했으며 벨기에 림버그 커잉에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Adélaïde von Geldern nasceu aproximadamente 1140, em Zilven, Gheldria, Países Baixos, seu pai, Heinrich I. von Geldern, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Agnes von Arnstein, tinha 22 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas com Gerard II van Loon. Ela faleceu em 4 de fevereiro de 1218, em Borgloon, Limburgo, Bélgica, com 79 anos, e foi sepultada em Kuringen, Limburgo, Bélgica.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Adélaïde von Geldern родилась около 1140 г. в местности цзилвен, джелдирланд, Нидерланды, её отцу по имени Heinrich I. von Geldern было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Agnes von Arnstein, 22. У неё было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери от Gerard II van Loon. Она умерла 4 февраля 1218 г. в местности борглун, лимбург, Бельгия в возрасте 79 лет и была похоронена в местности куринген, лимбург, Бельгия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Adélaïde von Geldern nació aproximadamente 1140, en Zilven, Gelderland, Países Bajos, su papá, Heinrich I. von Geldern, tenía 24 años y su mamá, Agnes von Arnstein, tenía 22 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos y 3 hijas con Gerard II van Loon. Murió el 4 de febrero de 1218, en Borgloon, Limburgo, Bélgica, a la edad de 79 años, y fue sepultada en Kuringen, Limburgo, Bélgica.
